reviews.comment:
NO carguen con Lucas M de la ante última isla. Te roba tiempo de vida...
Encima pedi una tarjeta serviclub y ni tenian ...

(Translated by Google)
Don't take Lucas M from the second-to-last island. He's a real time-waster... And on top of that, I asked for a Serviclub card and they didn't even have any...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURFaHFfNk13EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very convenient for refueling
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNFbnFtb3ZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lentos. Hay un montón de surtidores y siempre hay solamente uno o dos abiertos. Los autos se acumulan en la calle haciendo filas con esperas que pueden ser de media hora o más.

(Translated by Google)
Very slow. There are a lot of pumps, and only one or two are ever open. Cars pile up on the street, forming lines with waits that can be half an hour or more.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ0bFp2ZWV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pésima la organización me dicen que me pongan otra isla y cuando me pongo me dice que hay un camión esperando… Me fui y no pienso volver ....20 minutos esperando para que te cambien de isla y no poder cargar

(Translated by Google)
The organization was terrible. They told me to move to another island, and when I got there, it said there was a truck waiting… I left and I don't plan on coming back… 20 minutes waiting to be moved to another island and not even being able to charge.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ0cGZ6U0ZREAE
